subject: [PATCH v1 03/17] fuse: prepare for readdir passthrough on directories

2026-04-20.patch_summary: This patch prepares the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) kernel module to support readdir passthrough on directories by allowing the inode iomode state to be applicable to directory inodes and modifying the fuse_sync_release() helper function to handle directories. The goal is to improve performance by reducing the need for parallel dio operations, which are typically required for regular files. The patch makes several changes to various FUSE-related files, including cuse.c, dir.c, file.c, fuse_i.h, inode.c, and iomode.c.
